positive: A whimsical, detailed illustration of a stylized mountain range silhouette set against a vibrant, bioluminescent nebula sky. The central subject is a collection of stylized, abstract flora (mushrooms, ferns, crystalline flowers) clustering around the base of the peaks. The style is high-contrast vector art mixed with detailed watercolor washes, emphasizing clean, sharp silhouettes and magical realism. Use a limited but rich color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, forest green, and soft gold accents. Composition must be perfectly balanced and centered, designed for maximum impact on textile prints. The overall mood is mystical, aspirational, and cozy. Studio lighting, hyper-detailed, clean linework.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, noise, low quality, bad anatomy, cartoon, photographic, bokeh, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, debris, graffiti
